Game.Name: Super Family Circuit (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Super Family Circuit is a variable racing game from Game Studio Inc. and Namco. The game features different vehicles the player can race around a selection of tracks. While the game's imagery is focused on open-wheel/Formula One racing, there's rally and stock cars available as well. The racing itself uses a top-down perspective.The game includes numerous pieces of comic art that displays various scenes of the racing world.
Game.Notes: A variable racing game focused on open-wheel/Formula One racing using a top-down perspective. There's rally and stock cars available as well an the game includes numerous pieces of comic art that displays various scenes of the racing world.
